summary: P2 Core Lockdown Testing Complete. All 129 pytest tests pass (24 replay, 14 duplicate storm, 43 ARI stress, 48 core lockdown). All 7 lockdown API endpoints return 200. Frontend Lockdown Dashboard fully functional with all UI components.
critical_code_review_comments: All P2 stress test suites pass: replay safety (24), duplicate storm deduplication (14), ARI stress (43), core lockdown (48)
Lockdown API endpoints all secured with Bearer token auth
Provider capability matrix returns exely (split_messages, 30/dk, 3x retry) and hotelrunner (single_message, 60/dk, 5x retry)
Truth table correctly defines 8 drift types with resolution policies (manual_review, safe_auto_heal, risky_auto_heal)
Frontend dashboard shows all required Turkish labels: Yenile, Mapping Sagligi, Rezervasyon Lineage, Provider Yetenek Matrisi
seed_data_creation: None - tests work with existing data or empty state
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Core Lockdown testing complete. 129 unit tests cover replay safety, duplicate storm deduplication, ARI stress, and core lockdown logic. Frontend /lockdown route shows Lockdown Dashboard with health cards, metric cards, Mapping Sagligi section, Provider Yetenek Matrisi table, and Reconciliation Truth Table. All lockdown API endpoints at /api/lockdown/* require Bearer token auth.

P2 Replay Tests (24 tests).BasicReplay: PASS - new reservation, update, cancellation replay deterministic
P2 Replay Tests (24 tests).SequenceReplay: PASS - create/update/cancel sequences produce same results
P2 Replay Tests (24 tests).NormalizerReplay: PASS - HotelRunner/Exely normalize deterministic, hash stable
P2 Replay Tests (24 tests).ZeroSideEffects: PASS - SKIP produces no mutation, mapping failure consistent

P2 Duplicate Storm Tests (14 tests).IdenticalEventStorm: PASS - 5x/10x/20x identical events -> 1 CREATE + N-1 SKIP
P2 Duplicate Storm Tests (14 tests).ModificationStorm: PASS - rapid price changes, alternating updates/duplicates, stale events
P2 Duplicate Storm Tests (14 tests).CancellationStorm: PASS - multiple cancellations final state cancelled
P2 Duplicate Storm Tests (14 tests).MixedStorm: PASS - full lifecycle with duplicates, decision version preserved
P2 Duplicate Storm Tests (14 tests).HashResilience: PASS - 1 cent difference detected, email case different hash

P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).MassInventoryUpdate: PASS - 30 day availability, mixed values, stop sell bulk
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).RateBurst: PASS - last rate wins, multi room rate burst
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).MixedUpdates: PASS - availability and rate separate scopes
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).RestrictionPrecedence: PASS - stop sell close wins, min_los latest wins, cta/ctd mixed
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).BufferCoalescingKey: PASS - key deterministic, differs by room/type/date/rate_plan
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).DateRangeMerging: PASS - consecutive merge, non-consecutive no merge, different payload no merge
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).ProviderErrorHandling: PASS - 429 retryable, timeout retryable, auth config error, retry exhaustion
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).OutboundDeltaHash: PASS - same input same hash, different payload/provider different hash
P2 ARI Stress Tests (43 tests).MultiProviderCoalescing: PASS - dual provider output, three events dual provider

P1 Core Lockdown Tests (48 tests).DecisionEngine: PASS - 10 tests (duplicate, stale, cancel wins, unmapped fail, anomaly)
P1 Core Lockdown Tests (48 tests).MutationDetection: PASS - 8 tests (new, cancel, reinstate, date/room/rate/guest change)
P1 Core Lockdown Tests (48 tests).ProviderCapability: PASS - 9 tests (exely/hotelrunner capabilities, error classification, retry)

Lockdown API Endpoints (7 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/metrics/ingest: PASS - returns period_hours, since, totals, rates, decisions
Lockdown API Endpoints (7 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/metrics/lineage: PASS - returns total_lineages, by_status, by_provider, reconciled, unreconciled
Lockdown API Endpoints (7 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/metrics/reconciliation: PASS - returns total_open, by_type, by_severity, oldest_unresolved_age_hours
Lockdown API Endpoints (7 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/providers/capabilities: PASS - returns providers array with exely/hotelrunner

Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Title & Badge: PASS - Core Lockdown title, Production Readiness Dashboard subtitle, NOT READY badge
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Health Cards: PASS - Ingest Pipeline, Mapping Health, Reconciliation cards visible
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Metric Cards: PASS - total events, duplicate rate, stale rate, success rate, lineages, unreconciled
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Ingest Detail: PASS - Ingest Pipeline (Son 24 Saat) section with rates
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Lineage Detail: PASS - Rezervasyon Lineage section with status breakdown
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Mapping Sagligi: PASS - Exely and HotelRunner providers with completeness bars
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Reconciliation: PASS - Reconciliation section with case counts and oldest age
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Provider Yetenek Matrisi: PASS - Table with exely (split_messages) and hotelrunner (single_message)
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Truth Table: PASS - 8 drift types with gold_source and resolution policies
Frontend Lockdown Dashboard.Yenile Button: PASS - Refresh button works, data reloads

mocked_api_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All tests hit real backend via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
